query:
SELECT TABLE_NAME, CONSTRAINT_NAME, COLUMN_NAME
FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.KEY_COLUMN_USAGE
WHERE REFERENCED_TABLE_NAME = 'referral_partners'
AND TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE();
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2stQR1ySY2c4Vud.1719b3382959 --database RGtcxHR8RPxZsqyxZLCcuq --execute SELECT TABLE_NAME, CONSTRAINT_NAME, COLUMN_NAME
FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.KEY_COLUMN_USAGE
WHERE REFERENCED_TABLE_NAME = 'referral_partners'
AND TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE();
